series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of temporary instruction permit and identification card applications (BMV 2002) and accompanying paper work as required by O.R.C. 4507.05 4507.11 4506.06.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Applications issued for a temporary instruction permit prior to implementation of Print On Demand (POD) applications shall be retained for a period of seven (7) years, then destroyed. All microfilm will eventually be destroyed and microfilmed records will cease after implementation of the "print on demand" process. ; Electronic: At the time the application is made for a temporary instruction permit the information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained for a period of eight (8) years, then purged. ; Paper: Retain paper records that are not microfilmed for 7 years, then destroy. Retain paper records that are microfilmed for 2 years, then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
